corrections.current: καὶ μὴ εἴπῃς Πολλὰ γε τὰ ἐπʼ αὐτῆς.
corrections.correct: καὶ μὴ εἴπῃς· Πολλὰ γε τὰ ἐπʼ αὐτῆς.
corrections.note: Middle point after εἴπῃς is present in the print.
The transcript has advanced the verse number too early; printed verse number remains 13 here, with margin line numbers in parentheses nearby.

corrections.current: 14 οὗ ἐὰν ἐπιβλέψῃ, μὴ ἐκτείνῃς χεῖρα,
corrections.correct: 14 οὗ ἐὰν ἐπιβλέψῃ, μὴ ἐκτείνῃς χεῖρά,
corrections.note: Printed accent is on χεῖρά before the comma.

corrections.current: καὶ μὴ ἀπληστεύου, μή ποτε προσκόψῃς·
corrections.correct: καὶ μὴ ἀπληστεύου, μή ποτε προσκόψῃς·
corrections.note: Printed form is ἀπληστεύου with acute on -εύ-, not ἀπληστεύου. (No textual change beyond accent placement if normalization obscured it.)

corrections.current: πρότερος αὐτῶν μὴ ἐκτείνῃς τὴν χεῖρά σου.
corrections.correct: πρότερος αὐτῶν μὴ ἐκτείνῃς τὴν χεῖρά σου.
corrections.note: Printed accent on χεῖρά before following σου.

corrections.current: ξυλον προσκυματος Bℵc.a A (προσσκ.) C] ℵAC
corrections.correct: ξυλον προσκυμματος Bℵc.a A (προσσκ.) C] ℵAC
corrections.note: Apparatus reads προσκυμματος with double μ.
Printed siglum is B with superscript b, not Bᵃb.

corrections.current: επιβλεψης ℵ* (improb s postea revoc ℵ*)
corrections.correct: ἐπιβλέψης ℵ* (improb s postea revoc ℵ*)

corrections.note: The apparatus line is broken with a printed hyphen: δια- at line end, μασον on next line.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; parenthesized left-margin line numbers are present in the scan but not transcribed, which is acceptable. One verse number was misassigned in the body. Apparatus generally correct with a few minor typographic/siglum issues.
